loginDesc: Enter your credentials below to access the premium script hub.
heroDesc: Advanced LUA execution, undetected anti-cheat bypasses, and secure account synchronization. Built for ultimate stability and zero-latency performance.
faqDesc: Everything you need to know about the whitelist system, account credentials, and supported executors.
faq1Q: How does the Discord whitelist system work?
faq1A: For premium members, simply link your Discord account with VALINC SYNDICATE. Our bot will automatically sync your roles and grant keyless execution in seconds.
faq2Q: Can I use the VALINC UI Library for my own script projects?
faq2A: Absolutely. Along with our script hub, we provide a premium UI library framework with smooth animations, draggable windows, and customizable notification systems.
faq3A: VALINC SYNDICATE is fully optimized for top Level 7/8 execution engines including Synapse Z, Wave, Wave Lite, Solara, Celery, Macsploit, and more.
faq4Q: Is the platform safe and undetected?
faq4A: Yes. Our development team monitors Roblox's Byfron/Hyperion anti-cheat updates in real-time to ensure both our execution methods and UI libraries remain 100% undetected.
faq5Q: What is the difference between free access and premium?
faq5A: Free users get access to basic scripts with a 24-hour key generated via shortlinks. Premium users enjoy 100% ad-free (keyless) execution, all premium scripts, and advanced UI library features.
faq6Q: How fast are script updates pushed after a Roblox patch?
faq6A: Our cloud CDN pushes patches instantly. As soon as a game updates, our developers release fixes within minutes without requiring manual re-downloads.

authPanelDesc: Experience the highest tier of Roblox automation with undetected Byfron bypasses, elite script libraries, and a premium UI loader. Fully managed whitelist synchronization connects your identity to pure, stable execution power.
aboutHeroTitle: Three people and a Discord server.
aboutHeroDesc: We build Roblox scripts the way we wanted them built: stable, keyless, and patched before you notice they broke.
aboutProfileTitle: A small team that ships its own code.
aboutProfileDesc: VALINC SYNDICATE is a Roblox scripting project run by three people. We write the loaders, maintain the script vault, and handle support tickets ourselves. The work covers Blox Fruits, Pet Simulator 99, BedWars, and a couple dozen smaller titles the big hubs never pick up. Everything runs through a Discord-gated license, an edge CDN, and a patch pipeline that sits on top of Byfron and Hyperion updates.
aboutVisionDesc: Roblox scripting that stays usable through anti-cheat updates. When a game patches, a working version of the script should be back the same day, not next week.
aboutMissionDesc: Keep the libraries running and the loader clean. Bind access to Discord, keep the HWID policy honest, publish the changelog, and fix what breaks. That's the whole job.
aboutValue1Desc: Byfron and Hyperion compatibility comes before everything else. New features wait if they'd raise the detection rate.
aboutValue2Desc: Premium members never touch shortlinks or ad walls. Discord roles handle access in seconds, not 24-hour key timers.
aboutValue3Desc: Most fixes start as a bug report in the server. Popular feature requests land in the next update cycle.
aboutValue4Desc: Uptime, patch notes, and the HWID reset policy are all public. No hidden rate limits buried in the loader.
aboutTeamDesc: Three people run the whole thing. There's no support agency and no third-party dev team in between you and the code.
aboutRoleBio1: Writes the loader, owns the script vault, and signs off every release. The whole project sits on her shoulders.
aboutRoleBio2: Runs the community side. Announcements, the Discord server, and most of what brings new members through the door.
aboutRoleBio3: Takes the support queue so Valincia can keep coding. Open a ticket and the fast reply you get back is usually her.
aboutHistoryDesc: Three names and a few rebrands over four years. The project's grown, but it's still the same core of people.
aboutMilestone1Desc: Trading custom Roblox scripts with twenty friends. The repository was born out of a shared passion for Lua scripting.
aboutMilestone2Desc: Eight scripts and a hundred-member whitelist launched under the VALINC Hub name with a lightweight Lua execution loader.
aboutMilestone3Desc: Replaced ad-link keys with an automated Discord bot tying server roles directly to execution licenses.
aboutMilestone4Desc: Launched alongside the Byfron/Hyperion era script suite, reducing detections to zero and expanding to over 100 scripts.
aboutMilestone5Desc: Hardened the automated patch pipeline and expanded script coverage for top trending Roblox games.
aboutMilestone6Desc: Released the unified user portal, multi-language support, real-time ticket system, and universal loader.
aboutMeDesc: A premier Roblox scripting platform providing next-generation LUA execution, undetected anti-cheat bypasses, and an elite UI library framework.
aboutMeLeft: Built from the ground up by passionate developers and reverse engineers dedicated to delivering zero-lag, undetected Roblox script execution.
aboutMeRight: Connecting thousands of active members across our global network with seamless Discord whitelist synchronization and continuous cloud updates.
aboutJourneyDesc: Four years of constant innovation, refining execution stability and expanding our script library.

cookieDesc: We use essential cookies and local storage to keep you logged in, remember your preferences, and ensure seamless LUA execution performance.
cookiePolicyIntro: This Cookie Policy explains what cookies are and how VALINC SYNDICATE uses them on our website. We encourage you to read this policy to understand how we use cookies and what information they collect.
cookiePolicyWhatDesc: Cookies are small text files that are placed on your device when you visit a website. They are widely used to make websites work more efficiently, provide a better browsing experience, and report information to the website owners.
cookiePolicyEssentialDesc: These cookies are strictly necessary for the website to function. They enable core features like authentication, security, and session management. Without these cookies, the website cannot operate properly.
cookiePolicyEssentialItems: Authentication tokens (JWT)|Session management|CSRF protection|Cookie consent preferences
cookiePolicyFunctionalDesc: These cookies allow the website to remember choices you make and provide enhanced, personalized features such as language preferences and theme settings.
cookiePolicyFunctionalItems: Language selection (EN, ID, FR, JA)|Theme preference (dark/light)|UI layout preferences|Recently viewed items
cookiePolicyAnalyticsDesc: We use analytics cookies to understand how visitors interact with our website. This helps us improve our platform and user experience. All data collected is anonymized.
cookiePolicyAnalyticsItems: Page visit frequency|Navigation patterns|Feature usage metrics|Performance monitoring
cookiePolicyLocalStorageDesc: In addition to cookies, we use browser local storage and session storage to maintain your preferences and application state. These function similarly to cookies but allow for larger amounts of data.
cookiePolicyLocalStorageItems: User authentication state|Language and theme preferences|Cookie consent status|Application cache for performance
cookiePolicyManageDesc: You can control and manage cookies in several ways. Most browsers allow you to refuse or accept cookies, delete cookies that have already been set, and configure your browser to notify you when a cookie is being set.
cookiePolicyManageWarning: Please note that disabling essential cookies may impact the functionality of our platform, including login capabilities and script execution features.
cookiePolicyThirdPartyDesc: Some of our services integrate with third-party providers that may set their own cookies:
cookiePolicyThirdPartyItems: Payment processors (NOWPayments) for transaction processing|IP geolocation (ipapi.co) for automatic language detection|CDN services for flag icons and static assets
cookiePolicyRetentionDesc: Session cookies are deleted when you close your browser. Persistent cookies remain on your device for a set period or until you delete them manually. Our authentication tokens expire after 7 days for security purposes.
cookiePolicyContactDesc: If you have any questions about our Cookie Policy, please reach out to us through our support channels:
securityIntro: Enterprise-grade protection, anti-tamper bytecode execution, and zero-knowledge vault security engineered to safeguard your Roblox scripting assets.
secPillar1Desc: Custom VM virtualization and dynamic key swapping ensure scripts cannot be decompiled or dumped.
secPillar2Desc: Encrypted MySQL connection pooling with strict TLS 1.2+ certificates and automated daily backups.
secPillar3Desc: Distributed REST-based rate limiting prevents brute force attacks and API spam across global edge nodes.
secPillar4Desc: Hardware-bound token validation prevents key sharing, unauthorized reselling, and credential stuffing.
secBountyDesc: We take security vulnerabilities seriously. If you discover a bug or potential flaw in our execution panel or API, report it directly to our security team for a prompt reward.
termsIntro: Please read these Terms of Service carefully before accessing or using the VALINC SYNDICATE platform, API, and scripting services.
termsSum1Desc: Scripts and keys are strictly non-transferable and for personal use only.
termsSum2Desc: Attempting to reverse engineer, dump, or resell scripts results in permanent ban.
termsSum3Desc: All purchases are final. Refunds are governed by our strict SLA policy.
termsSec1Desc: By creating an account, acquiring a script key, or utilizing our portal, you agree to be bound by these Terms of Service. If you do not agree, you must cease using our services immediately.
termsSec2Desc: VALINC SYNDICATE grants you a limited, non-exclusive, non-transferable license to execute authorized scripts. You shall not decompile, disassemble, modify, or distribute any script bytecode or loader binaries.
termsSec3Desc: You are solely responsible for maintaining the confidentiality of your account credentials and license keys. Keys are locked to your designated Hardware ID (HWID). Reset requests are subject to cooldowns.
termsSec4Desc: All transactions processed via NOWPayments or authorized merchants are final. Refunds are only issued in the event of an unresolvable technical failure attributable directly to our backend service.
termsSec5Desc: VALINC SYNDICATE reserves the right to suspend or terminate access to any account or key found violating these terms without prior notice or financial reimbursement.
privacyIntro: We respect your digital privacy. This policy details what data we process, why we collect it, and how we protect your online identity.
privacyStep1Desc: Email, hashed passwords (bcrypt), and account creation timestamps for account identity.
privacyStep2Desc: HWID hashes, IP logs for anti-abuse rate limiting, and execution timestamps.
privacyStep3Desc: Stored securely in TiDB Cloud MySQL with TLS 1.2+ encryption at rest.
privacyRow1Never: Roblox account passwords or cookie tokens
privacyRow2Why: Preventing key sharing & API abuse prevention
privacyRow2Never: Personal real-name files or local disk data
privacyRow3Never: Credit card numbers or banking passwords
contactIntro: Have questions, need custom scripting solutions, or require immediate support? Connect directly with our official Discord syndicate network.
contactCardDesc: Our Discord server is our central hub for customer support, real-time script updates, community announcements, and developer inquiries.

changelogVer101Item1: [New] Multi-language support (EN, ID, FR, JA) with smart browser auto-detection.
changelogVer101Item2: [New] Dedicated trust & compliance pages: Cookie Policy, Security Architecture, Terms, and Privacy.
changelogVer101Item3: [Improved] Complete monochrome UI refinement across legal pages and navigation.
changelogVer101Item4: [Fixed] Fixed dropdown squishing in header language selector and responsive layouts.
changelogVer100Title: VALINC Syndicate 1.0.0 — Major Portal & Studio Release
changelogVer100Item1: [New] Complete Roblox Scripting Portal with HWID key management and license vaults.
changelogVer100Item2: [New] Integrated NOWPayments gateway supporting crypto & automated transaction tracking.
changelogVer100Item3: [New] Studio Staff & Developer Panel for live ticket support and release management.
changelogVer100Item4: [Security] Implemented TiDB Cloud SSL pooling, Upstash Redis rate limiting, and bcrypt auth.
changelogVer090Item1: [New] Core executor bytecode VM loader and initial dashboard prototypes.
changelogVer090Item2: [Improved] Optimized WebSocket telemetry for real-time remote panel server status.
